form.formComment: Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign tenth of 20 at Curragh November 2 over 1609m, in the wet; 19 len behind James J Braddock with 60.5kg at $13. On debut eighth of 11 at this track October 18 over 1609m, 13 len behind Ex Animo carrying 57kg at $5.50. This is an ideal race to kick off. Expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign tenth of 20 at Curragh November 2 over 1609m, in the wet; 19 len behind James J Braddock with 60.5kg at $13. On debut eighth of 11 at this track October 18 over 1609m, 13 len behind Ex Animo carrying 57kg at $5.50. This is an ideal race to kick off. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: At debut, 3rd of 10 at Curragh on March 28 over 2011m, 4.5 len behind Shaihaan with 58.5kg at $13. Open to improvement and expected to go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). At debut, 3rd of 10 at Curragh on March 28 over 2011m, 4.5 len behind Shaihaan with 58.5kg at $13. Open to improvement and expected to go on with it.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 12th of 20 at Curragh on November 2 over 1609m, on rain affected going; 24 len behind James J Braddock with 60.5kg at $23. Want to have another look at him.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 12th of 20 at Curragh on November 2 over 1609m, on rain affected going; 24 len behind James J Braddock with 60.5kg at $23. Want to have another look at him.

form.formComment: First-starter by Gun Runner out of Curlylocks. Looks ready to make a bright start.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Gun Runner out of Curlylocks. Looks ready to make a bright start.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 2nd of 20 at Curragh on November 2 over 1609m, in the wet; 6 len behind James J Braddock with 60.5kg at $11. Rates highly and can break through.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 2nd of 20 at Curragh on November 2 over 1609m, in the wet; 6 len behind James J Braddock with 60.5kg at $11. Rates highly and can break through.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding by Galiway out of Fille Du Septembre having his first start. Profiles nicely and is worth keeping safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding by Galiway out of Fille Du Septembre having his first start. Profiles nicely and is worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: First-starter by Parish Hall out of Legal Thriller. Hard to recommend without a market push.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Parish Hall out of Legal Thriller. Hard to recommend without a market push.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start second last of 13 at Listowel on September 23 over 1408m, on rain affected going; 18 len behind Straight Up with 60.5kg at $11. Went for a spell before returning second last of 13 at Gowran Park on April 8 over 1408m, on a slow track; 21 len behind Bobby Mcgee with 61kg at $51. Will need more time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third race start. First start second last of 13 at Listowel on September 23 over 1408m, on rain affected going; 18 len behind Straight Up with 60.5kg at $11. Went for a spell before returning second last of 13 at Gowran Park on April 8 over 1408m, on a slow track; 21 len behind Bobby Mcgee with 61kg at $51. Will need more time.

form.formComment: First-starter by Sea The Stars out of Meergorl. Prefer to just watch barring a strong market move.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Sea The Stars out of Meergorl. Prefer to just watch barring a strong market move.

form.formComment: First-starter by Dark Angel out of Ghazawaat. Prefer to let go without a strong market move.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Dark Angel out of Ghazawaat. Prefer to let go without a strong market move.

form.formComment: Resuming after a seven months break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 12 at Gowran Park September 2 over 1408m, 8 len behind Take Charge Star carrying 59.5kg at $29. On debut second last in a small field at Killarney July 16 over 1609m, soft track; 8 len behind A Boy Named Susie with 59kg at $13. Must be respected.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Resuming after a seven months break.
